title: Bastion Loot
quickAnswer: Bastions are high-risk, high-reward. They can contain major nether progression loot, but piglin brutes make them one of the most dangerous structures to rush.
keyFacts: Strong rewards can include gold blocks, enchanted gear, ancient debris-related supplies, and other rare nether items depending on bastion type.
Piglin brutes do not care whether you wear gold armor and hit very hard in close quarters.
Treasure bastions are especially valuable, but also some of the most punishing to loot carelessly.
commonMistakes: Assuming gold armor solves brute aggression.
Bridging into the center without a retreat path or fire resistance.
